fieldValues.value: RFC-022 reference implementation and consumers shipped

Schema + mirrors, srs-core RequiresRelation type, fulfillment-aware transition service with flip-last write ordering, requiresRelation on allowed-transitions, CLI stdin contract, transition_record WASM binding, repo validate warning, successor lifecycleState override validation (srs-rust#502), governance package 1.0.0 migration incl. previously missing supersedes relation type, gallery orphan healed, srs-web supersede routed through the fulfilled transition (srs-web#204). Released as v0.1.0-build.139.
srs-vscode schema mirror sync outstanding. Follow-ups: srs#159 (declared visibility/settled property on LifecycleState); pure relational derivation recorded as long-term direction.
